---
title: Teaching
---

## Courses

### Current

- **Econometría I**, Universidad de Granada — *course description to follow.*
- **Técnicas Cuantitativas I**, Universidad de Granada — *course description to follow.*

### Past

- *(to be added)*

## PhD courses

I run short PhD-level modules on **causal inference for applied microeconometrics**:

- Potential outcomes framework
- Randomised experiments
- Regression discontinuity design (RDD)
- Difference-in-differences (DiD)

I'm happy to deliver these at other institutions and PhD programmes, in English or Spanish — [drop me a line](mailto:alessiogaggero@ugr.es) if of interest.

## Teaching projects

I'm developing inquiry-based and Socratic approaches to teaching quantitative methods at undergraduate level. More to follow as the work matures.
